---
title: "3 - Visualization using ggplot"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
ds_long <- read_csv("1_datamanagement_files/fruits_long.csv")

```

```{r}
#| label: ggplot-fruit-bar
#| echo: true
#| fig-cap: "Fruit counts"

ds_long |>
  count(fruit, sort = TRUE) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(fruit, n), y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Most popular fruits",
       x = "Fruit", y = "Count")
```

```{r}
#| label: ggplot-fruit-by-diet
#| echo: true
#| fig-cap: "Fruits by diet type"

ds_long |>
  count(fruit, diet_type) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(fruit, n), y = n, fill = diet_type)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Fruits by diet type",
       x = "Fruit", y = "Count", fill = "Diet")
```


```{r}
#| label: ggplot-rank-distribution
#| echo: true
#| fig-cap: "Fruit preference by rank"

ds_long |>
  count(fruit, rank) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(fruit, n), y = n, fill = rank)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Fruit preference by rank",
       x = "Fruit", y = "Count", fill = "Rank")
```
